description: Letter from a teacher to a certain Moshe informing him that his son, Abū Saʿīd, read his Torah portion with a translation (tafsīr; likely refers to an Arabic translation but could also refer to Aramaic targum) and his portion in the Prophets as well. (Information from Goitein's index cards) EMS
description_he: מכתב ממורה למשה מסוים, המיידע אותו שבנו אבו סעיד קרא את פרשתו עם תרגום (תפסיר) ואת הפטרתו בנביאים.
